name: webflow-enterprise-rbac
description: Configure Webflow enterprise access control — OAuth 2.0 app authorization, scope-based RBAC, per-site token isolation, workspace member management, and audit logging for compliance. Trigger with phrases like "webflow RBAC", "webflow enterprise", "webflow roles", "webflow permissions", "webflow OAuth scopes", "webflow access control", "webflow workspace members".
